creator: dnelson@allantgroup.com
text:
In the last episode (Feb 09), Edwin Groothuis said:
> Maintainer of audio/sox,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/154618 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix you
> agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch and a
> committer will take care of it.

Oops.  Forgot to tweak the From: header when running send-pr.  I approve.

-- 
	Dan Nelson
	dnelson@allantgroup.com
